items.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes kill 18 as Israel says four soldiers killed by Hezbollah
items.summary: It comes a day after the US and Iran signed a deal to end their conflict, including fighting in Lebanon.

items.title: NYC Taxi Driver Gets $75,000 Helping Hand After Knicks Fans Destroyed his Car
items.summary: While many in New York City expended every breath in celebration of the Knicks NBA championship win, many others will have held theirs—knowing what happens when passionate American sports fans win tit…
